name: create_bar_chart
description: Creates and displays a bar chart visualization for financial data. Use when user asks to compare values across categories or wants to see trends over time.

parameters.description: Parameters for creating a bar chart

data.description: JSON string array of data points for the bar chart. Each item should have appropriate properties for bar chart visualization. Values should be in USD. Example: [{"category":"Jan","value":1500},{"category":"Feb","value":2000}] represents $1,500 and $2,000 respectively.
